reasoning_model_1: The audio content exactly matches the provided script '夜深了，森林里弥漫着神秘气息。' without any errors or hallucinations. Regarding the core dimension 'Pitch' (音高), the model successfully generates a male voice with a significantly lowered, deep pitch. From 00:00 to 00:03, the speaker maintains a consistent 'extremely low' (极低音) register, adding a breathy, resonant quality that enhances the 'mysterious' atmosphere requested by the text. The pacing is slow and deliberate, fitting the mood perfectly. The model fully satisfies the constraint.
reasoning_model_2: The audio fails significantly on multiple fronts. Firstly, regarding Content Accuracy, the model hallucinates a large amount of text. It reads the target sentence '夜深了，森林里弥漫着神秘气息' (00:00-00:02) but then continues with unrelated text: '低沉的嗡鸣...仿佛大地在呼吸...' until 00:10. Secondly, regarding the core dimension 'Pitch' (音高), the model uses a female or juvenile voice with a medium-to-high pitch range. It completely ignores the instruction for 'extremely low pitch' (极低音). The tone is bright and storytelling-like, rather than deep or mysterious. Due to the content addition and the complete failure to control the pitch, this is a 0 score.
model_comparison: Model 1 is the clear winner. Model 1 strictly followed the text script and the paralinguistic command, delivering the sentence in a very low, deep pitch that matched the atmospheric description. Model 2 failed completely; it generated a voice with normal/high pitch (opposite of the command) and hallucinated a long paragraph of text that was not requested. Model 1 demonstrates excellent control, while Model 2 demonstrates a failure in instruction following.
